fact_plain: All purchase orders in the system use EUR currency exclusively. No other currencies are present in the procurement data.
fact_technical: WAERS field in stg_sap__ekko shows 100% EUR currency across all 2,200 purchase order headers. No currency diversity detected.
evidence_sql: SELECT WAERS, COUNT(*) AS po_count, ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*)/SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) AS pct FROM main_staging.stg_sap__ekko GROUP BY WAERS ORDER BY po_count DESC

fact_plain: The organization has 4 active plants with material movements, concentrated heavily in Zagreb Central Warehouse which handles 50% of all movements, while the three regional warehouses split the remainder.
fact_technical: Plant cardinality from t001w/mseg join shows 4 distinct WERKS values: HT10 (Zagreb, 15,473 movements), HT20 (Split, 9,354), HT40 (Rijeka, 3,668), HT30 (Osijek, 3,468). Total 31,963 movements with 48.4% concentration in HT10.
evidence_sql: SELECT t.WERKS, t.NAME1 AS plant_name, COUNT(m.MBLNR) AS movement_count FROM main_staging.stg_sap__t001w t LEFT JOIN main_staging.stg_sap__mseg m ON t.WERKS = m.WERKS GROUP BY t.WERKS, t.NAME1 ORDER BY movement_count DESC
evidence_result_json: [{"WERKS": "HT10", "plant_name": "Zagreb Central Warehouse", "movement_count": 15473}, {"WERKS": "HT20", "plant_name": "Split Regional Warehouse", "movement_count": 9354}, {"WERKS": "HT40", "plant_name": "Rijeka Regional Warehouse", "movement_count": 3668}, {"WERKS": "HT30", "plant_name": "Osijek Regional Warehouse", "movement_count": 3468}]

fact_plain: All material numbers in the system use the CPE prefix, indicating a standardized naming convention for procurement materials.
fact_technical: 100% of materials in stg_sap__mara.MATNR use prefix 'CPE' (10 total materials). Single-prefix convention suggests either filtered dataset or highly standardized material numbering scheme.
evidence_sql: SELECT SUBSTR(MATNR, 1, 3) AS prefix, COUNT(*) AS n FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mara GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY n DESC

fact_plain: Material movements are dominated by movement type 201 which represents 84% of all transactions, with only three other types (161, 101, 122) making up the remaining 16%.
fact_technical: MSEG.BWART shows 4 distinct movement types: 201 (84.47%, n=27000), 161 (6.76%, n=2160), 101 (6.74%, n=2155), and 122 (2.03%, n=648) out of 31,963 total records in stg_sap__mseg.
evidence_sql: SELECT BWART, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*)/SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) AS pct FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mseg GROUP BY BWART ORDER BY n DESC

fact_plain: Purchase orders span fiscal years 2024-2026, with most activity in 2025. Material movements show similar timing but much higher volumes, peaking at over 18,000 records in 2025.
fact_technical: EKKO purchase orders: 994 records (FY2024), 1116 records (FY2025), 90 records (FY2026) based on BEDAT. MSEG material movements: 10,061 records (FY2024), 18,759 records (FY2025), 3,143 records (FY2026) based on MKPF.BUDAT. Data spans 3 fiscal years with peak activity in 2025.
evidence_sql: SELECT 'EKKO' as table_name, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM BEDAT) as fiscal_year, COUNT(*) as records FROM main_staging.stg_sap__ekko GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM BEDAT) UNION ALL SELECT 'MSEG' as table_name, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM BUDAT) as fiscal_year, COUNT(*) as records FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mkpf mkpf JOIN main_staging.stg_sap__mseg mseg ON mkpf.MBLNR = mseg.MBLNR AND mkpf.MJAHR = mseg.MJAHR GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM mkpf.BUDAT) ORDER BY table_name, fiscal_year

fact_plain: All material numbers follow a consistent CPE-XXX-NNN naming pattern, where XXX represents the product category (MDM, ONT, RTR, STB, SWT) and NNN is a sequential number.
fact_technical: Material numbers in mara.MATNR follow the pattern 'CPE-{category}-{sequence}' where category includes MDM, ONT, RTR, STB, SWT and sequence is 3-digit zero-padded. All observed materials have descriptions in makt and plant views in marc with consistent plant_count of 4.
evidence_sql: SELECT mara.MATNR, CASE WHEN makt.MATNR IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as has_description, CASE WHEN marc.MATNR IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as has_plant_view, COUNT(DISTINCT marc.WERKS) as plant_count FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mara mara LEFT JOIN main_staging.stg_sap__makt makt ON mara.MATNR = makt.MATNR LEFT JOIN main_staging.stg_sap__marc marc ON mara.MATNR = marc.MATNR GROUP BY mara.MATNR, has_description, has_plant_view ORDER BY mara.MATNR

fact_plain: The procurement data shows 8 distinct vendors operating across 4 plants, with vendor 0000100001 dominating spend across all locations, representing roughly 70% of total purchase order value.
fact_technical: Query shows 8 distinct LIFNR values (0000100001-0000100008) and 4 distinct WERKS values (HT10,HT20,HT30,HT40) in ekko/ekpo joins. Vendor 0000100001 accounts for 1,473 POs totaling 28,568,742.10 value units across all plants (HT10: 737 POs/14,426,223.85; HT20: 316 POs/5,926,602.15; HT30: 222 POs/4,119,089.45; HT40: 198 POs/4,096,826.65), while remaining 7 vendors total approximately 12M value units combined.
evidence_sql: SELECT ekko.LIFNR, ekpo.WERKS, COUNT(DISTINCT ekko.EBELN) as po_count, SUM(ekpo.NETWR) as total_value FROM main_staging.stg_sap__ekko ekko JOIN main_staging.stg_sap__ekpo ekpo ON ekko.EBELN = ekpo.EBELN GROUP BY ekko.LIFNR, ekpo.WERKS ORDER BY total_value DESC

fact_plain: All purchase orders in the system use processing status 05, indicating a single standardized status across the entire procurement process.
fact_technical: EKKO.PROCSTAT shows 100% concentration in value '05' across 2,200 purchase orders, with no other processing status codes present in the dataset.
evidence_sql: SELECT PROCSTAT, COUNT(*) as po_count, ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*)/SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) as pct FROM main_staging.stg_sap__ekko WHERE PROCSTAT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PROCSTAT ORDER BY po_count DESC

fact_plain: Serial number tracking is consistently used across all major inventory movement types, with 100% of goods receipts, transfers, and other key movements having serial numbers populated.
fact_technical: In stg_sap__mseg, serial number field SERNP shows 100% population across top movement types: 201 (27,000 records), 161 (2,160 records), 101 (2,155 records), and 122 (648 records). No null or empty SERNP values found in these high-volume BWART codes.
evidence_sql: SELECT mseg.BWART, COUNT(*) as total_movements, SUM(CASE WHEN mseg.SERNP IS NOT NULL AND mseg.SERNP != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_serial, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN mseg.SERNP IS NOT NULL AND mseg.SERNP != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*), 2) as serial_pct FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mseg mseg GROUP BY mseg.BWART ORDER BY total_movements DESC

fact_plain: All materials in the system have both inventory movements and associated equipment records, showing perfect alignment between materials management and equipment tracking.
fact_technical: FULL OUTER JOIN between stg_sap__mseg.MATNR and stg_sap__equi.MATNR shows 100% overlap: 10 distinct materials with movements, 10 distinct materials with equipment, and 10 overlapping materials (10/10 = 100% referential coverage).
evidence_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mseg.MATNR) as materials_with_movements, COUNT(DISTINCT equi.MATNR) as materials_with_equipment, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN equi.MATNR IS NOT NULL THEN mseg.MATNR END) as overlapping_materials FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mseg mseg FULL OUTER JOIN main_staging.stg_sap__equi equi ON mseg.MATNR = equi.MATNR

fact_plain: Key procurement fields show complete data coverage with zero null values across purchase order headers, line items, and material movements.
fact_technical: Null analysis across staging tables shows 0.0% null rates: EKKO.LIFNR (vendor) 0/2200 records, EKPO.NETPR (net price) 0/2200 records, MSEG.MENGE (quantity) 0/31963 records.
evidence_sql: SELECT 'EKKO_LIFNR' as field_name, COUNT(*) as total_records, SUM(CASE WHEN LIFNR IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN LIFNR IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*), 2) as null_pct FROM main_staging.stg_sap__ekko UNION ALL SELECT 'EKPO_NETPR', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN NETPR IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN NETPR IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*), 2) FROM main_staging.stg_sap__ekpo UNION ALL SELECT 'MSEG_MENGE', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN MENGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN MENGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*), 2) FROM main_staging.stg_sap__mseg ORDER BY null_pct DESC
